title: Westlab - Reviving Epsom Salt - 2kg Resealable Pouch - 100% Natural, Pure & Unscented Mineral Salts - Supports Sleep and Relieves Aching Muscles (Packing may vary).
features: A natural solution to aid recovery for a fit and healthy body.
Helps relax tired and aching muscles.
Excellent when used after sports and exercise.
description: Product Description Pharmaceutical-grade Epsom salts help to relax tired and aching muscles excellent when used after sports and exercise. Westlab Epsom salt is a natural solution to aid recovery for a fit and healthy body. This tried and tested mineral is ideal for muscle relaxation and sports Recovery. Westlab Epsom salts are made of pure magnesium Sulfate. Available in 2 kg. Ingredients Magnesium Sulfate. Directions Fill the contents of the bag into a warm bath and enjoy a relaxing and muscle relaxing experience. Safety Warning Seek advice of a healthcare professional before use if you are pregnant or breastfeeding. Box Contains 1 x Epsom Salt 2Kg Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: Westlab Ltd, 57 Dunsfold Park, Cranleigh, GU6 8TB, UK. RP. MSL, BL9 5NB, UK.
